expectations.evidence: Tool calls 4-5 fetch all pages of remediatable CVEs for host #1 (page 1 offset=0, page 2 offset=20, stopped when links.next=null). Tool call 5 explicitly notes: 'Per pagination-handling exception rule for remediatable CVE queries: fetch all pages automatically.'
Tool calls 4-7 all use remediation='Applicable' on vulnerability__get_system_cves.

Two tables: host priority table (Host, OS, Total CVEs, Remediatable, Critical, Important, Known Exploits, Last Check-in) and CVE priority table (CVE ID, Severity, CVSS, Known Exploit, Description, Advisory, Affected Hosts).
User-facing response uses only domain terms. No tool names.
'...and 7 more systems with 1-6 CVEs each. Would you like me to pull the remediatable CVE details for any of these hosts, or filter by a specific severity or environment?'
Final note: 'This agent operates in read-only mode. I can help you identify and prioritize vulnerabilities, but applying patches should be done through your normal change management process.'
